name: Rush Hour 2026
organizer: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
description: The event brings together aspiring developers, innovators, designers, and problem-solvers to collaborate and build groundbreaking solutions to real-world challenges within just 24 hours. Participants will brainstorm, design, prototype, and present innovative products under intense time constraints, testing their technical expertise, creativity, teamwork, and problem-solving ability.

name: 2-Day Techminar on SECURE FULL-STACK DEVELOPMENT USING AGENTIC AI 2026
organizer: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Kattankulathur Campus
description:
Hands-on exposure to modern full-stack development
integrated with Agentic AI workflows
Industry-oriented learning with real-time secure
application development
Combination of seminar + hackathon-based experiential
learning
Practical implementation of AI-assisted coding,
debugging, testing, and deployment
Focus on secure software engineering practices in AIdriven
environments
Team-based hackathon to solve real-world application
challenges
Guidance on integrating AI agents into frontend, backend,
and DevOps pipelines
Exposure to secure authentication, authorization, and API
protection mechanisms
Opportunity to build deployable prototypes within the
event duration
Mentoring support during hackathon sessions
Evaluation based on innovation, security, usability, and
implementation quality
Certificates for participation and winning teams
Networking opportunity with faculty, researchers, and
student developers

name: DataSphere 2026
organizer: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
description:
24-Hour Datathon 2026

Get ready for an exciting 24-hour innovation challenge where ideas meet data! Join students, developers, analysts, and AI enthusiasts to solve real-world problems using Data Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and Analytics.

Participants will work in teams to analyze datasets, build intelligent solutions, and present their ideas before a panel of industry experts. Whether you're a beginner eager to learn or an experienced coder looking to compete, this datathon offers an incredible platform to showcase your skills, collaborate with like-minded innovators, and network with professionals.

Event Highlights:

* 24-hour non-stop coding and innovation
* Real-world problem statements
* Exciting cash prizes and certificates
* Mentorship from industry experts
* Networking opportunities
* Internship and career exposure
* Food and refreshments throughout the event

Bring your creativity, coding skills, and problem-solving mindset to build impactful solutions. Challenge yourself, learn something new, and compete for exciting rewards.

Who Can Participate?
Students from all colleges and universities with an interest in Data Science, AI, Machine Learning, Programming, or Analytics.

Date: 7-8 August 2026
Venue: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
Team Size: 2-3
Registration Fee: 200

Think. Analyze. Innovate. Build. See you at the Datathon!

name: BioHack 2026
description:
? BIO-HACK Hackathon 2026 is here! ??
Innovate Biology. Heal the Planet. Transform the Future.
Join us for an exciting day of innovation, problem-solving, and groundbreaking ideas in biosciences and sustainable engineering.
? 25th July 2026
? 9:00 AM
? Rectangular Block, SIMATS Engineering
? Be part of the future of biotechnology and sustainability!
#BIOHACK2026 #Hackathon #SIMATS #Innovation #Biotechnology #Sustainability #Engineering #StudentInnovation #FutureTech #BioEngineering
